data.content: Implementation review approved. Reviewed /Users/cartine/foolery-6a0d against the knot description and acceptance criteria. The change is limited to the lightbox header/title editor layout in src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx and a targeted guard in src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox-width.test.ts. Browser verification at http://localhost:3211/beats?repo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery&state=queued&beat=foolery-177c&detailRepo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery confirmed the inline title editor expands across the available header width, leaves a 20.28px horizontal gap before the Close button, and does not overlap it. Computed input styles show 0px borders, transparent background, no outline/ring, appearance none, and a text cursor, matching the seamless inline-edit requirement. Sanity gates passed in /Users/cartine/foolery-6a0d: bun run lint (one pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368 only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
